barRaise.topFinding: Eleventh review and the same three HIGHs are unchanged, with the 06-05 prediction now realized: six releases (0.43.0 through 0.47.0) ran the destructive dashboard writer and live YaC.json reads barRaise null, audit 0/0/0, version 0.47.0. The writer at scripts/write-dashboard-status.ps1:98,103-110 is byte-for-byte unchanged. Meanwhile the one-day 0.43-to-0.47 burst built four more cosmetic stylesheet waves (cascade five layers to nine, styles-v2 through v10) and a second hidden AI chat feature (src/chat-panel.ts + worker /api/chat), ahead of the N6/N7 data gates that block the first AI feature, while the three cheap AI-autonomous HIGHs got zero attention. The strategic lens escalates MEDIUM to HIGH. Verdict at-risk and trending down: four HIGHs this cycle versus three last. Land the writer read-modify-write fix before 0.47.2 ships.
